creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: madpilot
Date: Tue Aug 28 12:03:44 2012
New Revision: 303278
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303278

Log:
  - Update to version 111.3.1
  - Convert to OptionsNG
  
  PR:		ports/171112
  Submitted by: 	Tijl Coosemans <tijl@coosemans.org> (maintainer)
  Approved by:	crees, tabthorpe (mentors, implicit)

Deleted:
  head/games/simutrans/files/patch-Makefile
  head/games/simutrans/files/patch-utils-csv.cc
Modified:
  head/games/simutrans/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/simutrans/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/games/simutrans/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/simutrans/Makefile	Tue Aug 28 12:02:30 2012	(r303277)
+++ head/games/simutrans/Makefile	Tue Aug 28 12:03:44 2012	(r303278)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	simutrans
-PORTVERSION=	111.2.2
+PORTVERSION=	111.3.1
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${SIMUTRANS_VERSION} \
 		SF/${PORTNAME}/pak64/${SIMUTRANS_PAK64}:pak64
@@ -20,9 +20,10 @@ LICENSE=	ART10
 LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/simutrans/license.txt
 
 SIMUTRANS_VERSION=	${PORTVERSION:S,.,-,g}
-SIMUTRANS_REVISION=	5583
-SIMUTRANS_PAK64=	111-2
+SIMUTRANS_REVISION=	5843
+SIMUTRANS_PAK64=	111-3
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE= DOCS
 MAKE_ARGS=	BACKEND=mixer_sdl \
 		COLOUR_DEPTH=16 \
 		OSTYPE=freebsd \
@@ -39,20 +40,23 @@ PLIST_FILES=	bin/simutrans \
 		share/applications/simutrans.desktop
 PORTDATA=	*
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
 post-patch:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} 's/-O[^ ]*//' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} 's/simutrans/.simutrans/' ${WRKSRC}/simsys.cc
 
 do-install:
 	cd ${WRKSRC}/simutrans && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \
 		"config font music pak skin text" ${DATADIR}
-.ifndef NOPORTDOCS
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/simutrans/readme.txt ${DATADIR}
 .endif
 	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/build/default/sim \
 		${PREFIX}/bin/simutrans-bin
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${FILESDIR}/simutrans ${PREFIX}/bin/simutrans
 	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/applications
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${FILESDIR}/simutrans.desktop \
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${FILESDIR}/simutrans.desktop \
 		${PREFIX}/share/applications/simutrans.desktop
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/games/simutrans/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/simutrans/distinfo	Tue Aug 28 12:02:30 2012	(r303277)
+++ head/games/simutrans/distinfo	Tue Aug 28 12:03:44 2012	(r303278)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-SHA256 (simutrans-src-111-2-2.zip) = e97279ab7149cef430bb53c6206786ff039915dfa98a1b597e61e3f192840732
-SIZE (simutrans-src-111-2-2.zip) = 3182907
-SHA256 (simupak64-111-2.zip) = 5cda187d578e5263a1a77f8cd09268e2694157f6ca4c3ad4921b3fc8710fea38
-SIZE (simupak64-111-2.zip) = 3688601
+SHA256 (simutrans-src-111-3-1.zip) = 732339b347e896a419502ae4177cc5876533646d8df7d627ffd85460d1dc66e6
+SIZE (simutrans-src-111-3-1.zip) = 3274627
+SHA256 (simupak64-111-3.zip) = d2dcd7de3e9c0a1a3d387b8d62afc5a6be957ed1b47edd070c0a4a611d034055
+SIZE (simupak64-111-3.zip) = 3533240
